hosting_text_1: Luminary caters to gatherings of any kind, including corporate events, family reunions, anniversaries, wedding parties, community events, and more with exclusive access to our main indoor and outdoor dining spaces, and four intimate dining rooms upon request.
hosting_text_2:
Our event hosting includes comprehensive planning support from concept to coordination. Choose from our signature menu or collaborate with our culinary team to create custom dishes. We partner with premier vendors for florals, entertainment, and audiovisual needs. 

To schedule private dining or an event, inquire at 
events@luminary.com, or click the link below.
private_text_1: Luminary offers four private dining rooms and one private outdoor seating arrangement for individuals, couples, or small groups, catering to gatherings of any kind, including special dates, anniversaries, social gatherings, family reunions, and more
private_text_2: Work directly with Chef Elena to craft a bespoke tasting menu tailored to your preferences. Our dedicated events team ensures seamless execution, from wine pairings to custom floral arrangements. Pricing begins at $185 per person for a five course experience.
